channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Elizabeth Warren endorses Senate candidate in a move that may backfire
American dream tied to ZIP code: Where starter homes remain affordable
item.description: The income needed for a typical starter home has risen by about $35,000 since 2019, but regional differences offer hope for some first-time buyers.

item.title: Army identifies two victims killed in Jordan attack; Trump vows Iran will pay
item.description: Two Army soldiers killed at a base in Jordan are the first U.S. deaths since Iran violated Trump's peace agreement, officials said.

item.title: Florida GOP Rep. Donalds proposes AI data center bill to lower utility costs
item.description: Republican congressman and gubernatorial candidate Byron Donalds introduced legislation Monday aimed at preventing artificial intelligence data centers...
